title: ETHGlobal Cannes
description: In-person 36-hour Ethereum hackathon at the Palace of Festivals. Applications closed.

title: AI Trading Agents Hackathon
description: Build AI trading agents using ERC-8004 or Kraken CLI. Agents operate with verifiable trust and real financial capability. Sponsored by Surge & Kraken.

title: Vertex Swarm Challenge 2026
description: Coordinate robots, drones, AI agents, and IoT fleets beyond the cloud. Focus on swarm robotics and autonomous machine fleet management.

title: StableHacks
description: Build institutional-grade stablecoin infrastructure on Solana. Intersection of DeFi and TradFi. Top 10 teams present live in Zurich. Organized by AMINA Bank & Solana Foundation.

title: INITIATE: The Initia Hackathon
description: Build on Initia and deploy as an Initia appchain/rollup. Tracks: DeFi, AI, Gaming. Winners may receive EIR onboarding with fundraising support.

title: HashKey Chain On-Chain Horizon Hackathon
description: Build on HashKey Chain across three tracks: DeFi, PayFi, and AI. Registration deadline April 15.

title: Agentic AI Hackathon with IBM watsonx Orchestrate
description: Design AI agents powered by IBM watsonx Orchestrate for workflow automation, digital skills, and integrations.

title: Arc & Circle Agentic Hackathon
description: Build agentic AI apps. Online build Apr 20-25, hybrid build day Apr 25 in San Francisco, demos & awards Apr 26.

title: AI Agent Olympics Hackathon
description: Build autonomous agents. Focus: agentic workflows, enterprise utility, multimodal intelligence, multi-agent systems. Onsite at Fiera Milano, Italy.

title: ETH Oxford 2026
description: 3-day in-person hackathon at the University of Oxford. Builders, researchers, and founders collaborate on blockchain, AI, and technology. 2025 edition had $100K prize pool.

title: ETHGlobal New York
description: Flagship in-person Ethereum hackathon at Metropolitan Pavilion. 36-hour hacking window.

title: ETHGlobal Lisbon
description: In-person Ethereum hackathon at Convento do Beato.

title: MunichTech EXPO AI Innovation Hackathon 2026
description: Build applied AI solutions for real industry challenges. Tracks: AI Agents, Generative AI, DeepTech, Enterprise AI, Industry 4.0. Partners: OpenAI, Anthropic, NVIDIA.

title: ETHGlobal Tokyo
description: In-person Ethereum hackathon in Tokyo.

title: AI Genesis 2026
description: Global hybrid hackathon culminating at /function1 AI Conference in Dubai. Online build Oct 26-Nov 2, live pitching Nov 3.

title: Ethereum Foundation ESP Grants
description: Rolling grants for protocol R&D, security research, formal verification, ZK research, developer tooling, and education.

title: Optimism Retro Funding (RPGF)
description: Retroactive public goods funding. Projects are nominated and badgeholders vote on allocations. Rounds distribute $10M-$30M+.

title: Arbitrum DAO Grants
description: Multiple tracks: Foundation grants, DAO proposals, domain-specific programs. $3B+ DAO treasury. Focus on DeFi, gaming, security, tooling.

title: Base Builder Grants
description: Rolling grants for consumer apps, DeFi, onchain social, developer tooling on Base (Coinbase L2).

title: Solana Foundation Grants
description: Rolling grants for DeFi, payments, DePIN, gaming, mobile, developer tooling, and security on Solana.

title: Uniswap Foundation Grants
description: Grants for DeFi research, MEV mitigation, Uniswap v4 hooks, security, and governance research. $74M+ treasury.

title: LayerZero Bug Bounty
description: Cross-chain messaging protocol. Highest bounty on Immunefi. Requires PoC and KYC for payout.

title: Sky (MakerDAO) Bug Bounty
description: DeFi lending/stablecoin protocol (formerly MakerDAO). 10% of funds at risk, capped at max.

title: Wormhole Bug Bounty
description: Cross-chain bridge protocol bug bounty.

title: Optimism Bug Bounty
description: L2 rollup bug bounty. Min $75,000 for critical. 10% of economic damage.

title: Alliance DAO Accelerator
description: 12-week crypto-native accelerator. 2-3 cohorts per year. Highly competitive. For DeFi, infrastructure, consumer, gaming startups.

title: Outlier Ventures Base Camp
description: 12-week accelerator with chain-specific tracks (Sui, NEAR, Aptos, etc.). Focus on AI x Web3, DeFi, DePIN.
